title: Rear Air Suspension Height Calibration
prerequisites: Fuel tank full (or consistent level — affects ride height)
No passengers, all cargo removed from vehicle
Ignition ON (engine OFF or running — engine not required)
Front and rear height sensors connected
warnings: Do NOT move vehicle or add weight during height learning step (Step 4)
Ensure vehicle is on a perfectly level surface — floor slope will be recorded as calibration offset
Fuel level affects ride height — maintain consistent fuel level between calibration sessions

steps.technical_detail: Read all 4 corner height sensors to establish pre-calibration baseline. DIDs: FL=0xF301, FR=0xF302, RL=0xF303, RR=0xF304. Formula: (raw_u16 * 0.1) - 100.0 = mm offset from nominal. Tolerance: ±8mm from target.
steps.caution: Document pre-calibration values for comparison after procedure

steps.technical_detail: UDS Service 0x10 sub-function 0x03 to Height Control ECU (0x7A0).
steps.caution: If rejected, check ignition state and adapter connection

steps.technical_detail: UDS RoutineControl (0x31) start (0x01) for Routine ID 0x0501. Clears all previously learned height calibration data. Vehicle will re-learn from scratch.
steps.caution: Non-critical if routine not acknowledged — may not be required on all variants

steps.technical_detail: UDS RoutineControl (0x31) start (0x01) for Routine ID 0x0502. ECU samples all 4 height sensors and records current position as the calibrated reference. 3-second sampling delay follows.
steps.caution: CRITICAL: Do NOT move vehicle or add/remove weight during this step. Allow 3 seconds after command for ECU to sample sensors.

steps.technical_detail: Re-read all 4 corner height sensors. Verify each corner reads within ±8mm of zero offset (nominal). Formula: (raw_u16 * 0.1) - 100.0 = mm offset. Success = abs(mm) <= 8 for all corners.
steps.caution: If any corner out of range: check sensor connections; verify vehicle is on level surface; repeat calibration

steps.technical_detail: Send TesterPresent (0x3E 0x00) to acknowledge, then allow session to expire naturally.
steps.caution: Cycle ignition OFF→ON and verify height warning light is clear. Drive at normal speeds — ECU will fine-tune height offsets automatically.

did_map.0xF301: Front Left Height Sensor (mm offset, formula: raw_u16 * 0.1 - 100.0)
did_map.0xF302: Front Right Height Sensor (mm offset, formula: raw_u16 * 0.1 - 100.0)
did_map.0xF303: Rear Left Height Sensor (mm offset, formula: raw_u16 * 0.1 - 100.0)
did_map.0xF304: Rear Right Height Sensor (mm offset, formula: raw_u16 * 0.1 - 100.0)

outcome_summary: Resets and re-learns ride height reference points for all 4 corners. Resolves height warning lights and side-to-side lean after suspension or sensor service. ECU tolerance is ±8mm per corner.
